meaning: [域] British Indian Ocean Territory,英属印度洋领地
examples: Jupiter's moon Io, whose density is 3.5 grams per cubic centimetre, is all rock.
All those IO systems were way too complicated.
Most IO channel types now have asynchronous versions.
Fusion-io speaks to the new architecture powering cloud, mobile, big data, and social media.
Nutanix is currently using Fusion-io PCIe cards but is open to new PCIe card technologies.
